allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npx, python, python3, py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object {$_ -ne ''} | Select-Object -First 20)
